goal: Discover smaller venues and local band nights that aren't on big ticket sites.
Locate community gardens and urban gardening groups.
open: Search city parks page + Google Maps for 'community garden' near you.
Join 1-2 local gardening Meetups/Facebook groups and scan posts for upcoming workdays or orientations.
Visit a garden on a workday — introduce yourself and ask about membership or volunteer opportunities.
If there’s a waitlist for plots, ask about volunteering to get quicker access or to learn while you wait.
Consider signing up for a Master Gardener class or local workshop to meet people and gain credibility.
